title: Voyage
content:
The mystique of the sea,
    where waves act as snares,
    hang boughs over wet
    blackness wherever winds
    die driven ashore.

    Melancholy vastness-its pleasure
    the dim lights swallowed
    in glutton happiness
    the further I search
    the sea.
meaning:
"Voyage" is a quintessential example of Paul Cameron Brown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
